props.name: totalItems
props.description: Total number of items (the full dataset size)

props.name: itemHeight
props.description: Height of each item in rows (default: 1)

props.name: fixedItemHeight
props.description: Fixed height of each item, alias for itemHeight

props.name: memoizeLayout
props.description: Whether to memoize the layout and bypass Flexbox recalculation on scroll frames (default: true)

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Render function: returns the string content for an item at a given index

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback when an item is selected (Enter key)

props.name: overscan
props.description: Number of overscan rows to render above/below the viewport (default: 2)

props.name: springScroll
props.description: Enable spring scroll animations (default: true, respects prefersReducedMotion)
